target: 6. The One to Protect
(After that, me and Mio parted ways with Koyuba-san and headed to the funeral hall)

(Third funeral…
It's still the same as the 22nd one I know.)

Ah, Shin-chan. 
You're here.

Yeah, yeah.
What's up? You need something?

My dad said, since the ceremony's over, 
you should take a break with Shin-chan.
Oh.
Still, I was surprised about Kaori-chan.

Huh?
Yeah, I guess.
Probably at the inn by now.

I just checked my phone, 
she sent a message saying she arrived safely.
She must've swapped contact info already…

Probably discussing the live show right now.
She said she's meeting with the chamber of commerce people at the inn.
Ah, right.

I never thought a classmate 
would become a pop star…

If her big sister found out Kaori-chan's doing this, 
she'd be shocked too.

If a classmate's doing a live show 
at the festival I love so much, 
she'd definitely want to be in the front row.

Haha, that's true.
She probably said "I hope the festival comes soon" every day.
Yeah, I can picture it.
Kaori-chan was really looking forward to the festival.
Yeah.

Then… here.
This is the flyer for the live show.
Thanks.

Also, if you want, 
you can take some merchandise. 
I'd be happy if you came to the live show with this.

Thank you!
I'll definitely go!

("Live Show & Talk Announcement"… 
There's a talk too?)

Ah, Shin-chan, you're in trouble!
Don't tell your dad about this!
Why?

Why? 
Fans coming just for Kaori-chan 
will be everywhere.

If we don't prepare enough ingredients, 
we might not have enough.
Oh, that's probably okay.
The location for this live show is a secret.

But both me and the chamber of commerce people 
want as many people as possible to come.

We're planning to stream it online 
so anyone can watch.
Wow, the fans will be so happy!
Yeah, it's a good chance for people to learn about the festival on Hitogashima.
Yeah, it's also part of the town revitalization.
Honestly, I think it'd be better if it wasn't a secret…

If too many people come, 
the locals might not be able to handle it.

Yeah…
That's why it's a secret.

But how could she even think to do a live show 
at such a small island festival?
I asked my agency to make it happen.
Oh, really?

Now that I'm an idol, 
I can help the island somehow.

I was raised here…
It makes me happy to be able to give back this way.
I see…
Back then, I really understood her feelings.

I could feel her determination 
to give back to the island.
Yeah… She really must care about this island.
Yeah.
(That's why I can't just let her die.)
(I can't let that night repeat.)
Mio… protect her…
Shin-chan?
(Comes from Ushio…)

(And the classmate, Kaori Koyuba, 
who returned to the island out of concern for it)

(Even though we just reunited, 
she's one of my important friends)
(Then… I have to protect her.)

(Stop being careless.
What I need to do is…)

(Just survive today.
And…)

(Protect as many people as I can 
from the shadows.)
